title: Daily Driver: Social Update
summary: The launch of this Patreon for Daily Driver also sees the game’s topic on TIGSource Forums as the first Playdate game! And also on IndieDB as perhaps the first Playdate game? Though I do see fellow devs and Patreon Creators RNG Party are already listed but they are yet to add their current Playdate game.
content:
The launch of this Patreon for Daily Driver also sees the game’s topic on TIGSource Forums as the first Playdate game!

And also on IndieDB as perhaps the first Playdate game? Though I do see fellow devs and Patreon Creators RNG Party are already listed but they are yet to add their current Playdate game.
